short_summary: El Niño confirmed, Xi in Pyongyang
rationale: Xi's confirmed visit to Pyongyang deepens the authoritarian axis relevant to Poland's security environment, while El Niño confirmation sustains indirect cost-of-living pressure; no qualitative new shock this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit is now confirmed, deepening the China-Russia-North Korea axis. This consolidates a bloc that supports Russia in its war against Ukraine, indirectly affecting Poland's security calculus and NATO posture.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active, raising risks of commodity price shocks and energy market volatility that feed into Polish inflation and cost of living.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli military activity in Lebanon continues at baseline level; no escalation beyond established pattern, minimal direct relevance to Poland.
